top_signals.title: AI Productivity Gains Are Years Away, Deutsche Bank’s Reid Says
top_signals.summary: Artificial intelligence is likely to enhance productivity signficantly but any such impact on economies may still be years away, Deutsche Bank analyst Jim Reid said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea is the canary in the coalmine of the AI boom
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s experiment with leveraged single-stock ETFs has shown how quickly passive investing, concentrated markets and retail speculation can feed on one another, says Helen Thomas The new frontier for the AI boom isn’t Silicon Valley but South Korea. While the country has long been home to technology giants such as Samsung Electronics, the country’s [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin can fall below $58K if one of its 'cleanest' metrics copies history: Analysis
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin NUPL metric data suggested that BTC price action should make new cycle lows in order to preserve historical patterns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
